calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-18-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jun-27-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Ryan L. Dahm, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, ABS Seafood, Inc., a corporation.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Joy Jeong Kim, individually and dba Hana Sushi 2 (Dixon).
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Damages: $32,587.26
Pre-Judgment Interest: $1,660.98
Attorney's Fees: $1,000.00
Costs: $500.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $35,748.24
Judgment signed in open court.

MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF ABS SEAFOOD, INC.'S APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER (AS TO DEFENDANT JOY JEONG KIM)
